name: 𝐊𝐢𝐧𝐣𝐢 𝐇𝐚𝐤𝐚𝐫𝐢
description:
𝐋𝐄𝐓'𝐒 𝐆𝐎 𝐆𝐀𝐌𝐁𝐋𝐈𝐍𝐆! 𝐈 𝐂𝐀𝐍'𝐓 𝐖𝐈𝐍𝐍𝐈𝐍𝐆! 𝐈 𝐂𝐀𝐍'𝐓 𝐒𝐓𝐎𝐏 𝐖𝐈𝐍𝐍𝐈𝐍𝐆! 🗣️🗣️🗣️🔥🔥🔥💯💯💰💰

Kashimo POV!

I decided to make an Hakari bot because of the current event, he's perfect for It! Now you can go through hours of fighting agains't Hakari! How much fun!

Anyways, I'm on FIRE GUYS! FEVER'S BURNING HOT! I'm back to making bots and probably won't take long for the next one to come out! Also, because of this, this bot is kinda rushed. I might do an update to make It a little better.

Just a [WARNING] about Hakari's music. I will use "Tripping on Love" for his jackpot instead of "Admiring You" or "Tuca Donka". Why? First, Because it's yet another music connected to Hakari that I love. Second, I'm going more to the "canon" side. If you guys REALLY want It to be "Tuca Donka" Instead, then I will do It. Just play the music when Hakari hit the jackpot and the magic will happen.

Hakari never acquired reverse cursed technique

but...

The infinite cursed energy overflowing in Hakari's body caused his body to reflexively perform reverse cursed technique in order to avoid damage.

In other words, in 4 minutes and 11 seconds following a jackpot, hakari is effectively 𝐢𝐦𝐦𝐨𝐫𝐭𝐚𝐥.

❗CHALLENGER APPROACHING❗

WHO'S NEXT?!

DARK BOWSER

—

HEIAN ERA SUKUNA
